summary_en: FY3/26 final dividend Y38/share (Y35 ordinary + Y3 80th anniversary special), total Y2,111M. Ordinary component raised Y4 from prior forecast (Y31→Y35). Annual dividend Y64/share (Y61 ordinary + Y3 special) vs. FY3/25 adjusted Y53/share post-3:1 split (+Y11, +21.9%). Effective 2026-06-25. Funded from earned surplus.
title_en: Notice Regarding Dividend on Surplus (Dividend Hike and 80th Anniversary Commemorative Dividend)
translation_en_brief: Central Automotive Products announced on 2026-05-14 that its board approved a final dividend for FY3/26 (year ended 2026-03-31) of Y38 per share, comprising Y35 ordinary dividend and Y3 80th anniversary commemorative dividend, with total payout of Y2,111M. The ordinary component represents a Y4 increase from the company's prior forecast of Y31 per share, driven by better-than-expected financial performance and the company's stated "stable and high dividend" policy. Combined with the interim dividend of Y26 per share paid in Q2, the full-year dividend totals Y64 per share (Y61 ordinary + Y3 special). Adjusted for the 3-for-1 stock split executed 2025-04-01, this represents an increase of Y11 per share (+21.9%) versus FY3/25 actual dividend of Y53 per share. The dividend will take effect 2026-06-25 and requires approval at the 87th Annual General Meeting scheduled for 2026-06-24. Dividend is to be paid from retained earnings.
